basics.name: Dmitrii Shilov
basics.label: Software Developer Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Software Engineer and Tech Lead with over 17 years of experience in JavaScript/TypeScript full-stack development. Built and shipped products at Microsoft, EPAM, and Akvelon — from VS Code extensions and Azure blockchain tools to performance optimization across 30+ enterprise web apps. Comfortable leading teams of 6+ engineers, designing architecture from scratch, and owning the full delivery pipeline from CI/CD to production monitoring.

work.name: EPAM Systems
work.summary: Customer: Albert Heijn. Full-stack developer on Engineering Enablement project.
highlights: Evolved internal plugins for Backstage (Spotify) developer portal
Designed and implemented internal tools to integrate with third-party cloud solutions
Led refactoring initiatives across the platform

work.name: EPAM Systems
work.summary: Customer: London Stock Exchange Group. Performance optimization across enterprise web applications.
highlights: Conducted performance analysis and applied optimization techniques on 30+ web applications
Added heap snapshot capability to the QA framework
Coordinated cross-team task execution for performance improvements

work.name: Akvelon, Inc.
work.summary: Outsourced to Microsoft across multiple projects. Led teams of 6 engineers on greenfield projects.
highlights: Built Azure Blockchain Extension for VS Code from scratch — architecture, MVP, CI/CD, cross-platform support
Designed Node.js tool deploying k8s infrastructure for Hyperledger private blockchain
Built CHIE suite: OKR Tool, QaaS (KPI tracking), Cloud Readiness Criteria — Angular/Ionic/.NET Core/Azure
Created TypeScript decorator library implementing Retry, Circuit-breaker, Memo, Singleton, FSM patterns
Contributed to Hyperledger Fabric SDK
Implemented 40+ BI reports (MSSQL/SSRS) for Valant customers

work.name: Tensor (Тензор)
work.summary: 9 years building a large-scale enterprise web platform — from junior engineer to team lead.
highlights: Designed and implemented SSR, i18n/l10n, and HTML generator from custom XAML-like modules
Built a resource bundler (like Webpack) with tree shaking using Node.js, Grunt, Gulp, ESprima
Refactored monolith into 200+ micro-frontend modules with RequireJS
Designed and implemented BFF service with Node.js, Redis, Express, Cluster
Built client-side desktop app with WebSocket communication, file system access, and cryptography (Java applets, C#, ActiveX)

projects.name: TG News Reader
projects.description: Full-stack personal Telegram news reader with media lightbox, download workers, i18n, TOTP auth, and Azure deploy.
highlights: React 19
Hono
SQLite/Turso
Drizzle ORM
Azure Container Apps
691 tests

projects.name: jira-prepare-commit-msg
projects.description: Git hook that automatically prepends JIRA ticket ID to commit messages.
highlights: Node.js
Git hooks
Open source

projects.name: dmitriishilov.com

Tailwind CSS
Azure Static Web Apps
